name: VitalDAO
recommendation: PROCEED TO CODE REVIEW — Full app built with 41 Swift files across 6 layers. All Apple-only frameworks, no third-party deps. HealthKit, SwiftData, StoreKit 2, Swift Charts integrated. Mock data for all services. Ready for Xcode project creation and simulator testing.
notes: Build complete: 41 Swift files, Mac Catalyst BUILD SUCCEEDED. Ready for code review. Architecture: 6 SwiftData models (HealthMetric, DataSource, ConsentRecord, ClinicalStudy, EarningRecord, UserProfile), 8 services (@Observable, HealthKit/ConsentManager/StudyMatching/Earnings/DataAggregator/MockDevice/Notification/StoreKit2), 3 ViewModels (Dashboard/Wallet/Studies), 11 views (Dashboard/Wallet/Studies/Earnings/DeviceConnections/DataSharing/ConsentLog/Paywall/Onboarding/Settings/MainTab), 6 DesignSystem files + 5 reusable components. Features: unified health dashboard with Swift Charts, data wallet with mock on-chain consent, study matching with 6 demo studies, earnings tracking with monthly chart, device connection management, granular data sharing controls, blockchain audit log, StoreKit 2 paywall (Free/$15 Pro/$40 Enterprise), 4-screen onboarding. Design: deep navy #0B1426 bg, vibrant green #00E676 accent, bio-cyan #00BCD4 secondary, card-based layout, circular progress rings, SF Mono data values. Fixed: iOS 17 Tab API compatibility, async let dictionary pattern, EarningCategory raw value mismatch.
